description_long: This is a modern, rectangular bungalow surrounded by a tall green hedge and featuring a flat roof. The structure is predominantly white with large, floor-to-ceiling windows on multiple sides, allowing for ample natural light. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a wooden deck, and a small garden area with a blossoming tree and several lounge chairs. The front yard is enclosed by a white wall with a central gate, and the main entrance is accessible via a short pathway. The building appears to have a single story with an open, spacious layout and multiple access points. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimalism, and integration with outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and garden, all enclosed by a green hedge.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from the rear corner, highlighting the backyard with a pool, wooden deck, garden, and lounge chairs.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the main entrance, white wall, central gate, and a clear view of the hedge and front lawn.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the opposite rear corner, focusing on the large windows, pool, and blossoming tree in the backyard.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the side of the bungalow with a garage entrance, hedge-lined pathway, and a partial view of the backyard garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
